namedLocations.description: Earth /ˈɜːrθ/ is the third planet from the Sun, the densest planet in the Solar System, the largest of the Solar System's four terrestrial planets, and the only astronomical object known to harbor life.

transcript.text: The Mars 2020 Rover will initiate a long sought after mission of returning Martian rocks and soil to the Earth for further study.
The Mars Sample Return mission is a high priority not only for the scientific knowledge it will provide, but also the opportunity it presents to tackle a difficult technological challenge.
Remember, Mars 2020 is going to have the first Mars helicopter.
The Mars Sample Return will include the first ever rocket launched from another planet.

ocr.text: Mars Sample Return Mission Concept Media Reel
These graphics and animations are current as of April 2020 and will likely change as the campaign matures.
All credits are NASA/JPL-Caltech unless otherwise specified.
3. Mars 2020 rover sampling and caching animations sequence
4. Mars 2020 leaving sample tubes on the surface
7. Mars 2020 rover watching the lander come in
8. Mars sample return lander touching down on the surface of Mars
9. Mars sample return lander with its solar panel deployed and fetch rover
11. Robotic arm transferring samples from fetch rover to lander
12. Mars Ascent Vehicle (rocket) launching samples into Mars orbit
13. Mars Ascent Vehicle launch and tracking by Earth Return Orbiter
15. Earth Return Orbiter captures sample container (Courtesy ESA)
16. Sample container processed and sterilized; containment system jettison before return
17. Earth Return Orbiter departs for Earth (Courtesy ESA)
19. Earth Entry Vehicle deploys for Earth (Courtesy ESA)
20. Earth capsule returning to Earth (Credit NASA/GSFC)
21. Soundbite: Jim Bridenstine at State of NASA announcement of Mars Sample Return
23. Sample fetch rover wheel testing (Credit NASA/GRC)
